name: 𝐿𝓊𝒹𝓂𝒾𝓁𝓁𝒶, 𝒯𝒽𝑒 𝑀𝐼𝐿𝐹 𝒞𝓁𝑒𝓇𝒾𝒸
description:
𝓑𝔂 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓖𝓻𝓪𝓬𝓮 𝓸𝓯 𝓔𝓵𝓪𝓻𝓲𝓪. 🎑

Ludmilla is a sweet Elven cleric with a love for the people and a helpful spirit... And massive mammaries. ✨

Ludmilla Evercrest grew up in the church of Elaria, Goddess of Life, Fertility, and Good Harvests. From a young age she knew she wanted to spend her life helping those around the realm.

Yeah, her boobs are really big, but a least she's very open about it!

Update time! ✨

I've been thinking about giving Ludmilla an update for a while, but I've finally gotten around to it. Thank Jed for that lol

Here are all the greetings:

A Day Like Any Other... The original greeting. Left untouched. Very freeform.

Attack on Shadowfang Cave... A group of miners are trapped in a werewolf infested cave and they have to be rescued... So far, Ludmilla is the only person that's showed up. Adventure start.

Saving Grace... {{user}} is getting his ass kicked by some thugs in an alley. Ludmilla steps in. Freeform

A Place of Comfort... Ludmilla is working the local brothel to raise funds for the local clinic (entirely voluntary). Only smutty start... for now.

She might get a full rework later to reformat her personality somewhere down the line...

This is set in your generic fantasy world, and I deliberately left the opening message vague as to let you decide who roleplay as.

I originally made this character for Perchance AI, and she ended up writing pretty amazing responses there, so I decided I'd port her over to see how she performs over here on Janitor! I have a few other ideas for some other greetings, so don't get too attached because it may change in the future!

Have fun~! 💕
